data.description: Japanese Finance Minister Katayama noted that the U.S. Treasury's forex report highlighted the bilateral statement affirming that excessive foreign exchange fluctuations are undesirable.
Japan finance minister Katayama: won’t discuss specific currency levels
Japan Finance Minister Katayama declined to comment on specific FX levels.
Japan Finance Minister Katayama said Tokyo and Washington remain in close 24-hour communication.
The USD/INR 1-month NDF strengthened to 97.25, with higher crude oil prices increasing pressure on the Indian rupee.
China central bank injects 89 billion yuan through 7-day reverse repos at 1.40% vs prior 1.40%: statement
Japan finance minister Katayama: ready to act appropriately on currency shifts whenever necessary
U.S. military: latest round of strikes on Iran completed
Chinese Vice Foreign Minister Ma Zhaoxu held talks with U.S. Deputy Secretary of State Landau during a July 22-23 visit to the United States, China's Foreign Ministry said.
China’s vice foreign minister Ma Zhaoxu visits US, meets with Deputy Secretary of State Landau: Chinese foreign ministry
Iranian media reported that an explosion occurred in Taft, a city in central Iran's Yazd Province

data.title: Polymarket predicts 74% chance Fed will hold in July with BTC approaching $69K and steady ETF inflows.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is nearing the $69,000 mark as inflows into Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) continue to drive interest in the cryptocurrency. Despite this surge, experts remain cautious about the current positioning of Bitcoin in the market.

data.title: Iran regime-fall odds at 10.5% as US-Iran strikes rise; US military launches new strikes amid clashes near Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: The U.S. military has initiated a fresh series of attacks on Iran amidst escalating conflicts around key shipping passageways close to the Strait of Hormuz.
China's central bank set a weaker yuan midpoint at 6.7939 per dollar, compared with the previous session's close of 6.7777, as currency markets monitored policy signals.
Scribe Therapeutics increases IPO size and sets price.
Japan's factory sector showed continued strength in July, with manufacturing output recording a sharp increase, according to the latest PMI survey.

data.title: Chimera Investment Corporation Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Date
data.description: Chimera Investment Corporation (NYSE: CIM) revealed it is set to unveil its financial performance for the quarter ending June 30, 2026, on August 5, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call and live webcast to review the results will take place at 8:30 A.M. ET on the same day. For those interested, the U.S. Toll-Free number is (866) 604-1613 and the International number is (201) 689-7810. To access the webcast, visit https://www.chimerareit.com/news-events/ir-calendar.DialogContentPlayback of the call will also be available post-event.

data.title: Safetyfirst Systems, LLC Provides Notice of Data Security Event
data.description: On July 23, 2026, Safetyfirst Systems, LLC ("SFS") based in Parsippany, New Jersey, announced a data security incident potentially impacting specific individuals. SFS has no reported cases of information misuse linked to this event but is taking precautionary measures.

data.title: Sunrate and Mastercard Release White Paper on Agentic AI and the Future of B2B Global Payments
data.description: On July 23, 2026, in Shanghai, Sunrate, a worldwide payment and treasury management platform, partnered with Mastercard, a leading technology company in payments, to introduce a collaborative white paper titled "Beyond Automation: Defining Agentic Global Payments." This announcement was made during the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference.

data.title: Lyntris Inc. Announces Filing of Registration Statement for Proposed Initial Public Offering
data.description: On July 23, 2026, Lyntris Inc. submitted a registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Lyntris is a defense technology firm specializing in "sense-to-act" connectivity solutions for the contemporary connected battlespace. The filing aims to provide essential information to the public and potential investors about the company's operations and financial performance.
